series_metadata.series_description: The Internal Registration Plan (IRP)requires audits to be conducted on the number of miles Ohio based carriers travel in a year. As a result of the audit, the findings can either show that a refund or assessment needs to be issued.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: IRP, Article XV, Section 1500, requires IRP carriers to retain their records for the current registration year plus 3 years. The records are then available for auditing for IRP mileage and by the State Auditor. Therefore, we must also retain IRP audit records for the same period., Paper: Recycle
